Calendar.__name: <?xml version="1.0" ?><root available-locales="en_US,sv_SE,pt_BR,ja_JP,fr_FR,hu_HU,de_DE,ca_ES,ar_SA,fi_FI,zh_CN,es_ES,nl_NL" default-locale="en_US"><Name language-id="sv_SE">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="pt_BR">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="ja_JP">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="fr_FR">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="hu_HU">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="de_DE">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="ca_ES">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="ar_SA">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="fi_FI">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="en_US">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="zh_CN">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="es_ES">Site Name</Name><Name language-id="nl_NL">Site Name</Name></root>
